The '''''Chandrilan Daily Messenger''''' was a daily newsfeed focusing on current [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrilan]] news. [[Morgraine Delefrenquin]] worked for the ''Chandrilan Daily Messenger'' as the Society News Editor, writing the feature section "[[Your Stars And Mine]]."
